biological_replicate: F2 hybrids generated from F1 crosses between X. malinche females and X. birchmanni males
technical_replicate: the measurement was then repeated in media dosed with 5 μM rotenone
experimental_design: hybrid incompatibilities, in which alleles derived from two different species no longer interact properly in hybrids.
factor_value: the X. malinche mitochondrial haplotype and X. birchmanni ancestry
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_technical_replicates: the measurement was then repeated in media dosed with 5 μM rotenone
